_about: Honey CO2 estimate config. Model params come from EcoLogits' registry (hooks/eco-models.json), NOT hand estimates. This file only holds: grids, savings, and aliases for frontier models too new for the registry.
_engine: Faithful port of EcoLogits v0.8.2 (genai-impact/ecologits, MIT). scripts/eco_report.py runs the real package for the authoritative breakdown.
_match: A model id is resolved by: (1) exact name in eco-models.json, else (2) first alias whose 'match' substring appears in the id -> borrow that registry model's params, else (3) default_alias. Params and provider always come from the registry.
_grid_note: Per-provider, location-based. Anthropic on AWS Trainium (Project Rainier PA/IN/MS ~500), OpenAI on Azure (~400), Google on GCP (~330). Researched, not from EcoLogits; market-based (renewable PPAs) would be lower.
_savings_note: Token reduction vs a no-Honey baseline. 'full' = 0.57 from the README benchmark (Opus 4.8, 20 tasks x3). lite/ultra are estimates.
_aliases_note: For ids newer than the registry. Each points at the closest registry model whose EcoLogits params we borrow.
